prompt: Based on the provided clean, corporate website screenshot to generate a vibrant, chaotic page with a vaporwave aesthetic, using pink and teal neon, roman busts, and glitch art effects.
prompt_refined: Generate a vibrant, chaotic webpage, transforming the clean corporate design of image 1 into a full vaporwave aesthetic. The page should heavily feature pink and teal neon elements. Integrate classical Roman busts as key visual motifs, with one prominently replacing the large image of the person on the right side of the page from image 1. Apply pervasive glitch art effects throughout the entire layout, including text, graphics, and background, to create a highly distorted and digitally chaotic appearance.
objects: Website header (logo, navigation links, phone number display)
Classical Roman bust on the right side of the page
Other classical Roman busts (as visual motifs)
The person from image 1 (should not be present)
